title: Case eq statement doesn't work when net is compared with z

features.name: net compared with z using case equality operator
features.description: Code should include a net (wire/logic) that is continuously assigned and compared with 1'bz using the case equality operator (===)

features.name: case equality operator with z literal
features.description: Code should include the case equality operator (===) used with a z literal (1'bz) to compare against a driven net
